product.description:
Ergonomic Camera Grip with Universal 1/4" Screw – Compatible with GoPro, phones, and action cams. Anti-slip handle ensures comfort and control. Lightweight and portable (only 80g). Ideal for vlogging, travel & sports.

This universal camera grip (Product ID: PY-095) is a must-have accessory for vloggers, photographers, and travelers. Designed with ergonomics in mind, it features a finger-shaped anti-slip handle that provides comfort and control during shooting. Lightweight yet sturdy, this grip includes a universal 1/4" screw mount, making it compatible with most smartphones, GoPro, and action cameras. The adjustable screw knob ensures a secure fit, while the compact size (130×52×75mm) and weight (only 80g) make it ultra-portable. Whether you're filming indoors or outdoors, this handle ensures stability and ease of use.

Key Features:

  • ✅ Ergonomic anti-slip finger grip for comfortable handling

  • ✅ Universal 1/4 inch screw mount for camera/phone compatibility

  • ✅ Lightweight & compact – perfect for on-the-go shooting

  • ✅ Made of durable plastic; weighs only 80g

  • ✅ Ideal for vlogging, sports, travel, and daily video recording

product.title: Feiyu G6 Max 3-Axis Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer for Mirrorless Smartphone GoPro
product.shortDescription: 【Updated Multifunctional Focus Ring】With 2.0 upgraded focus ring,its sensitivity is increased by 25%. Each axis is equipped with physical motors locks. These new motor locks can be used to make balancing easier and protect the gimbal during transport.
product.description:
Main Feature

【Wifi Control+Cable Contol】Support Wifi control and cable control two ways to connect the camera,more free and easy to operate.Like with the cable control,G6 Max gimbal support to control Sony cameras and Panasonic GH4,about the detailed camera models,please check with it on the description. 【Motor Lock Design+New Quick Release System】G6 Max 3 axis are equipped with physical motor locks to prevent shaking,and can be used to fix the 3 axis when balancing and packing.With the new upgrade of quick release system,you can assemble and disassemble the stabilizer in seconds without waiting for the shooting. 【Larger OLED Screen】G6 Max gimbal equipped with a low-power OLED screen,its screen area is increased by 200% compared with G6 Plus gimbal,which more intuitively displays the parameters of the gimbal and the camera. 【Updated Multifunctional Focus Ring】With 2.0 upgraded focus ring,its sensitivity is increased by 25%.Supports to control of zoom/focus,3-axis rotation,adjustment of parameters such as ISO,WB and exposure. 【Splashproof Design】G6 Max whole device adopts splashproof technology,which can achieve splash-proof and dust-proof performance.Therefore,this handheld gimbal can follow the photographer into a variety of complex shooting environments.

 

Still 1 for 4 with an Increased Payload

The new and improved high torque, magnetic, brushless motors boast a 50% increase in output, making the gimbal compatible with Mirrorless Cameras, Smartphones, Sports Cameras and Compact Cameras. The G6 Max can carry up to 1.2kg, which support the combination of more cameras and lenses to provide more flexible use.

 

Half A4 paper size

Compared to the G6 Plus, the payload of the G6 Max has increased, but the volume has decreased by 20%. With its new compact design, the G6 Max can be used one-handed and can be packed away with ease.

New Motor Lock Design & Quick Release System

Each axis is equipped with physical motors locks. These new motor locks can be used to make balancing easier and protect the gimbal during transport. This new additional allows the gimbal to be set up quickly and easily so you don't miss the action.

Multi-function'Magic Focus Ring' 2.0, With Improved Sensitivity

The multi-function "Magic Focus Ring" is upgraded to 2.0 and its sensitivity is increased by 25%. It supports control of zoom/focus, three-axis rotation, and adjustment of parameters such as ISO, WB, and exposure values.

9 Handy Shooting Modes


The modes of the G6 Max have been upgraded too. The G6 Max comes complete with 9 functional modes, which meet the needs of any professional videography and daily recording, allowing you to shoot like a pro. Without the need for the App, it can be operated with just one hand, and professional shooting can be made simple.

Scientifically Designed for a comfortable experience

It is made of aerospace aluminium alloy with light weight and no loss of texture; The arc design of the handle follows the ergonomic principle, and the flexible silicone on both sides makes the grip more comfortable and labor-saving; The well thought out button layout allows you to use most operations, such as shooting and mode selection with one hand.

Splash-proof design for more shooting environments


The whole gimbal adopts waterproofing technology, which can will protect it from splashes and dust. Therefore, it can follow the photographer into a variety of complex shooting environments.

WiFi control + cable control for more choices

The G6 Max supports both WiFi and cable connection to the camera for freer and easier control of your shooting. The gimbal can control photography, videography, zoom and focus, as well as adjusting settings such as ISO, WB, Exposure, and shooting modes.

Long Battery Life & Reverse Charging

The gimbal has a runtime of 9 hours to meet daily shooting needs. At the same time, the G6 Max supports reverse charging to supply power to the camera and other devices to ensure you can shoot for as long as you need.

FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit ——3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer for Smartphone, Action Cameras & Mirrorless Cameras
FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit

FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit ——3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer for Smartphone, Action Cameras & Mirrorless Cameras

The FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit is the ultimate compact 3-axis gimbal for content creators, vloggers, and travel filmmakers who need versatility and professional stabilization. Supporting up to 2kg (4.4 lbs) of payload, it seamlessly stabilizes smartphones, action cameras, and lightweight mirrorless setups—making it the perfect tool for vloggers, solo filmmakers, and mobile content creators alike.

Now featuring Smart Tracking 4.0 with built-in AI, gesture control, and a 1.3” OLED touchscreen, the SCORP-Mini 3 delivers smooth, intuitive operation without the need for external accessories. Its redesigned quick-release system, enhanced axis locks, and accessory mounting options make setup faster and more versatile than ever.

With a 4500mAh battery offering up to 14 hours of runtime, It supports fast charging and fully charged in appx. 1.6 hours using an 18W or higher PD charger, and Bluetooth wireless camera control, this compact gimbal is built for long shooting days, cinematic creativity, and travel-friendly convenience.

Whether you're shooting in vertical mode for TikTok or capturing pro-level footage on the go, the SCORP-Mini 3 is your intelligent, all-in-one stabilizer for every scenario.

This Kit includes the Gimbal with smartphone holder, a quick release plate for cameras, and an action cam accessory kit, allowing seamless switching between smartphone, mirrorless camera, and GoPro – a true all-in-one solution.

Key Features:

  • Powerful Performance: Supports up to 2 kg – suitable for smartphones, mirrorless cameras with lenses up to 50mm, and action cams.

  • Smart Control: AI Tracking 4.0 & Gesture Control, improved Bluetooth camera connectivity.

  • Maximum Precision: 1.3" OLED touchscreen, multifunction wheel for zoom, focus & axis control.

  • Long Battery Life: 4500 mAh battery for up to 14 hours of usage, Using a PD fast wall charger greater than 18W, it only takes about 1.6 hours to fully charge.

  • Comfort & Ergonomics: Redesigned grip for one-hand or two-hand operation, ideal for dynamic filming & vlogging.

  • Travel Friendly: Enhanced motor lock for safe transport & quick setup.

Package Includes:

  • SCORP Mini 3 Gimbal (base version with smartphone holder)

  • Camera Quick Release Plate

  • Action Cam Mounting Accessories

  • USB-C Charging Cable

With the SCORP Mini 3 Kit, you have the perfect stabilisation solution at your fingertips – compact, flexible, and powerful.

FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Pro Kit – Professional 3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer

Key Features

  • Motorized 3-Axis Stabilization with professional-grade performance

  • Supports Smartphones, Action Cameras, DSLR & Mirrorless Cameras

  • High Payload Capacity up to 4.4 lb / 2 kg – ideal for larger cameras & lenses

  • Detachable Handle for one- or two-handed operation

  • AI Tracking 4.0 & Gesture Control (subject tracking up to 59 ft)

  • Advanced Stabilization 10.0 Algorithm for smooth cinematic footage

  • 4500mAh Built-in Battery – up to 14 Hours Runtime, quick charging (~3h)

Product Overview

The FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Pro is designed for creators who demand professional stabilization in a compact, all-in-one solution.
It can seamlessly stabilize and control smartphones, action cams, mirrorless cameras, and DSLRs.

This upgraded Pro Kit includes premium accessories such as an extension pole, LED fill light, articulating arm, and protective case – giving you everything you need for professional filmmaking, vlogging, or live streaming.

seo.metaTitle: Feiyu SCORP-Mini 3 Pro Kit - AI Tracking Gimbal for iPhone, Lightweig…
seo.metaDescription: FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Pro is a professional 3-axis gimbal for smartphones, action cams, DSLR and mirrorless cameras. With a 4.4 lb payload, detachable handle,…

Reviews.comment: Exceptional stabilization and the AI Tracking 4.0 locks on subjects flawlessly. Battery life easily lasted me a full day of shooting. The included carbon fiber pole is sturdy and lightweight.
Great gimbal for mirrorless and phones. OLED touchscreen is handy and the Magic Wheel is intuitive. A little learning curve for balancing heavier setups but overall fantastic.
Solid build and reliable tracking. The quick release is improved compared to older models. Would like an additional mounting point on the handle.
Works well for smartphones and small mirrorless cameras. I had to rebalance a few times when switching lenses. LED fill light is a nice bonus.
AI tracking is decent but occasionally loses fast-moving subjects. Customer support helped but firmware updates are needed to smooth it out.
Disappointed — had trouble balancing my Sony a6400 with a 35mm lens. Feiyu site compatibility list should be clearer. Returned after troubleshooting.
Love the detachable handle and the runtime is impressive. The carry case fits everything neatly. Great value for the Pro Kit accessories.
Performance is good but heavier camera setups approach the 4.4 lb limit. Make sure to balance precisely and stick to lenses under 50mm as recommended.
Stabilization 10.0 makes footage look cinematic. Setup is straightforward and Bluetooth camera control worked well with my iPhone.
Good features but the unit I received had a sticky joystick and needed a firmware update out of the box. After updates it's better but initial out-of-box experience was frustrating.
Excellent ergonomics and the Magic Wheel makes smooth pans effortless. The articulating arm accessory is very useful for creative angles.
Nice feature set for creators. I docked a star for the weight when fully accessorized — it's still portable but bulkier than I expected.

product.title: Feiyu SCORP Mini 3 Kit - Gimbal for iPhone, Action Camera & Lightweight Cameras
product.shortDescription: The FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit is a compact 3-axis gimbal designed for creators on the move. With up to 2kg payload, it supports smartphones, mirrorless cameras and action cams like GoPro. Featuring AI Tracking 4.0, Bluetooth camera control, a 1.3" OLED touchscreen and multifunction wheel, it delivers pro-level stability in a portable form. The Kit includes quick release plate and action cam accessories, making it a true all-in-one stabiliser for vlogging, travel and filmmaking.
product.description:
The FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit is a compact 3-axis gimbal designed for creators on the move. With up to 2kg payload, it supports smartphones, mirrorless cameras and action cams like GoPro. Featuring AI Tracking 4.0, Bluetooth camera control, a 1.3" OLED touchscreen and multifunction wheel, it delivers pro-level stability in a portable form. The Kit includes quick release plate and action cam accessories, making it a true all-in-one stabiliser for vlogging, travel and filmmaking.
FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit ——3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer for Smartphone, Action Cameras & Mirrorless Cameras
FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit

FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit ——3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer for Smartphone, Action Cameras & Mirrorless Cameras

The FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Kit is the ultimate compact 3-axis gimbal for content creators, vloggers, and travel filmmakers who need versatility and professional stabilization. Supporting up to 2kg (4.4 lbs) of payload, it seamlessly stabilizes smartphones, action cameras, and lightweight mirrorless setups—making it the perfect tool for vloggers, solo filmmakers, and mobile content creators alike.

Now featuring Smart Tracking 4.0 with built-in AI, gesture control, and a 1.3” OLED touchscreen, the SCORP-Mini 3 delivers smooth, intuitive operation without the need for external accessories. Its redesigned quick-release system, enhanced axis locks, and accessory mounting options make setup faster and more versatile than ever.

With a 4500mAh battery offering up to 14 hours of runtime, It supports fast charging and fully charged in appx. 1.6 hours using an 18W or higher PD charger, and Bluetooth wireless camera control, this compact gimbal is built for long shooting days, cinematic creativity, and travel-friendly convenience.

Whether you're shooting in vertical mode for TikTok or capturing pro-level footage on the go, the SCORP-Mini 3 is your intelligent, all-in-one stabilizer for every scenario.

This Kit includes the Gimbal with smartphone holder, a quick release plate for cameras, and an action cam accessory kit, allowing seamless switching between smartphone, mirrorless camera, and GoPro – a true all-in-one solution.

Key Features:

  • Powerful Performance: Supports up to 2 kg – suitable for smartphones, mirrorless cameras with lenses up to 50mm, and action cams.

  • Smart Control: AI Tracking 4.0 & Gesture Control, improved Bluetooth camera connectivity.

  • Maximum Precision: 1.3" OLED touchscreen, multifunction wheel for zoom, focus & axis control.

  • Long Battery Life: 4500 mAh battery for up to 14 hours of usage, Using a PD fast wall charger greater than 18W, it only takes about 1.6 hours to fully charge.

  • Comfort & Ergonomics: Redesigned grip for one-hand or two-hand operation, ideal for dynamic filming & vlogging.

  • Travel Friendly: Enhanced motor lock for safe transport & quick setup.

Package Includes:

  • SCORP Mini 3 Gimbal (base version with smartphone holder)

  • Camera Quick Release Plate

  • Action Cam Mounting Accessories

  • USB-C Charging Cable

With the SCORP Mini 3 Kit, you have the perfect stabilisation solution at your fingertips – compact, flexible, and powerful.

Great build quality and battery life. Wish the app pairing was a little simpler.
Excellent for mirrorless cameras under 50mm. The quick release plate is a time-saver.
Stabilization is good but I had occasional drift with heavier lenses near the 2kg limit.
Perfect for iPhone vlogging. OLED screen is clear and controls are intuitive.

Battery lasted through a full day of shooting. Fast charging is a nice bonus.

AI Face Tracking 4.0 works really well in most lighting. Small learning curve on settings.
Good idea and features, but the mobile app needs stability improvements and firmware updates.
Compact yet powerful. Love the dual-handle option for smoother pans.
Works great with my GoPro and iPhone. The cooling fan clamp is handy for long shoots.

Reviews.comment: Solid build and the 3-shoe extension is super useful — I mounted a mic and a small LED and it made a huge difference. Comfortable grip for long shoots.
Works great with my mirrorless body and my smartphone. The detachable handle for low-angle (C-TYPE) shots is a nice touch. Wish the included screws were a bit sturdier.
Good stabilizer for the price. Lightweight and folds compactly. Took off one star because the finish scratched a bit after heavy use.
Fantastic for run-and-gun setups. I use it with a GoPro Hero11 and a shotgun mic. Stable and easy to switch between handheld and low-angle modes.
Design is ergonomic and I like the multi-shoe top, but the handle adapter felt a bit loose until I tightened it fully. Still does the job.
Not bad for light setups but struggled with heavier DSLRs — felt a bit unstable. Good if you use mirrorless or action cams.
Received with a missing screw pack and one shoe mount was wobbly. Customer service helped but it delayed my shoots.
Compact fold size is great for travel. Setup is quick and mounting accessories is straightforward. Would recommend for vloggers.
Decent product but the instruction manual could be clearer about converting to the C-TYPE low-position configuration.
Excellent compatibility — used it with DSLR, smartphone and a camcorder without issues. Comfortable for two-hand shooting.
Exceeded expectations. The 3-shoe top allowed me to mount a light, mic, and monitor simultaneously. Very stable and ergonomic.
Build quality is OK but the paint chips easily and one of the locking knobs became stiff after a month.

Impressive for the price. Foldable design is compact and the controls are intuitive.
Balanced easily for my Canon M50 and the follow modes are responsive.
Great compatibility with GoPro and small action cams. Motor torque is adequate.
Solid material and feels professional. Perfect for travel shoots.
Setup guide was helpful, and the quick release is convenient for switching devices.
Stays steady even with heavier lenses up to the listed max load. Very happy.
The adjustable legs and leg angle adjustment make it stable on uneven surfaces.
Overall very good, but the companion app could use some UX improvements.
Performs well with smartphone and small mirrorless cameras; wish it had slightly longer battery life.
Build quality is good. Slight learning curve to get perfect balancing.
Nice foldable gimbal — a couple firmware updates could tighten up motor tuning.
Happy with purchase. Quick release makes swapping cameras fast and reliable.

Decent stabilization but had occasional micro-jitters with my heavier lens setup.
Functions as advertised but the motor makes a faint noise at certain angles.
Average battery life and takes time to master manual balancing for best results.
Portable and light but had compatibility hiccups with my older phone model.

Not what I expected for the price. Several calibration issues and jitter under movement.
Fantastic for smartphone content creators — responsive and easy to use.

Reviews.comment: Excellent little panning unit — smooth 360° motion and no batteries to worry about. Worked great on my mirrorless for sunrise timelapses.
Compact and solid. Used it on a small tripod and it delivered flawless pans for an hour-long sequence.
Very convenient design and truly battery-free. Slight wobble with heavier rigs, but fine for compact cameras.
Good build and easy to set up. Would prefer a grippier base for use on uneven surfaces.
Does the job for most timelapse shots but feels a bit bulky for travel kits.
Disappointed — couldn't keep a heavier DSLR steady during a long move. Fine for small cams only.
Perfect for long exposures and panorama timelapses. No batteries means no surprises mid-shoot.
Arrived brand new, setup was intuitive. Smooth panning and great value for the price.
Works well with universal mounts. The base can slip on very smooth surfaces, so add a mat if needed.
Exactly what I needed for my landscape timelapses. Sturdy and reliable 360° rotation.
Good performance without a tripod on flat surfaces. Lightweight and easy to carry.
Received unit with a cracked base. Support was slow and I had to return it. Could be a one-off.

product.shortDescription: Professional videographers with a DSLR or mirrorless camera can achieve impressively smooth shots with the SCORP 2 3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer from FeiyuTech. product.description:
Professional videographers with a DSLR or mirrorless camera can achieve impressively smooth shots with the SCORP 2 3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer from FeiyuTech. An improved L-shaped quick release system accommodates both vertical and horizontal shooting. Intuitive controls and an ergonomic dual-handle design allow the operator to follow the action in low-angle and upright positions. Various shooting modes and precise settings can be accessed via the touchscreen on the handgrip or via Bluetooth app control. A built-in 2500mAh battery allows the gimbal to run for 13 hours at a time.

 

FeiyuTech SCORP 2 Overview

 
 
 
 
Professional videographers with a DSLR or mirrorless camera can achieve impressively smooth shots with the SCORP 2 3-Axis Gimbal Stabilizer from FeiyuTech. An improved L-shaped quick release system accommodates both vertical and horizontal shooting. Intuitive controls and an ergonomic dual-handle design allow the operator to follow the action in low-angle and upright positions. Various shooting modes and precise settings can be accessed via the touchscreen on the handgrip or via Bluetooth app control. A built-in 2500mAh battery allows the gimbal to run for 13 hours at a time.
Quick Release 2.0
An upgraded L-shaped bracket allows for both vertical and horizontal shooting orientations. Balance your mirrorless or DSLR camera with the sliding base and lock it in place with the onboard knobs. Further support for your camera configuration is provided with the included lens support bracket. The SCORP 2 has a total load capacity of 5.5 lbs to suit most lightweight gear configuration.
AI Tracking Modes
 
An integrated AI tracking module allows for intelligent shooting without the need for peripheral accessories. Gesture control enhances user interaction by enabling intuitive commands:
  • Spread Palm: Activate Shutter/Record function.
  • Thumbs Set: Cease Tracking.
  • "OK" Gesture: Initiate or Halt Tracking.
  • L-shape Gesture: Engage Custom Framing for precise composition.
These gestures streamline the shooting process, offering effortless control over essential functions directly through intuitive hand movements.
Dual-Handgrip Design, Integrated Kickstand
An integrated handle and grip provide a dual-handgrip design with a natural bevel. Easily transition between underslung and upright shooting without requiring additional handles or accessories. Additionally, the arm has a built-in kickstand to rest on a tabletop without needing the mini tripod.
Precision Stabilization
A new algorithm enhances the SCOPR 2's anti-shake and stabilization performance for improved visuals without fear of motion distortion. This advancement ensures smoother, clearer footage, even in dynamic or unstable environments, making it ideal for professional videographers.  
Intuitive Controls, Multiple Shooting Modes
Control your gimbal using the 1.3" touchscreen, onboard buttons, joystick, and multifunctional knob for fine tuning. Choose between five follow focus modes—pan and tilt, pan follow, FPV follow, flash follow, and lock—to create dynamic movements in your cinematography.
Bluetooth and Cabled Camera Control
Included cables allow you to connect the shutter controls of your Canon, Panasonic, Nikon, and other compatible models. Integrated Bluetooth connects to the SCORP app on your phone to adjust parameters like aperture, shutter, and ISO. Auto-tune your motors to improve operation. You can even use somatosensory technology to control the direction of your camera using phone movements.

seo.metaTitle: Feiyu SCORP-Mini 3 Pro Kit Gimbal for Smartphone Camera & Action Cam…
seo.metaDescription: FeiyuTech SCORP Mini 3 Pro is a professional 3-axis gimbal for smartphones, action cams, DSLR and mirrorless cameras. With a 4.4 lb payload, detachable handle,…

Reviews.comment: Fantastic stabilization and AI tracking is rock-solid for vlogging. The included LED fill light and telescoping pole really complete the kit.
Very smooth footage, long battery life. Setup took a few minutes to balance my mirrorless but once done it's perfect.
Good build quality and useful touchscreen. Wish the quick release was a bit faster but performance is excellent.
Works well with smartphones and action cams. Had trouble balancing with a heavier lens — capped at 50mm works as described.
Decent gimbal for the price but firmware needed updating out of the box. After update it's better but encountered occasional drift.
AI tracking is good sometimes but loses subject in low light. Battery life is great though.
Not reliable for heavier mirrorless setups despite spec. Contacted support — shipping the unit back for inspection.
Received with a loose joint causing wobble. Customer service helpful but waiting on replacement part.
Compact, powerful, and the Magic Wheel is very intuitive. Excellent carrying case and accessories in the Pro Kit.
Solid performer for action cams and phones. Bluetooth camera control worked smoothly with my phone and GoPro.
Great value with the extension pole and articulating arm. A bit heavy when packed, but perfect on shoots.
Good stabilization overall, OLED screen is handy. Would like more preset customization in future firmware updates.
